layer1.mission: Coordinate a larger repository with multiple teaching and validation surfaces.
ownershipAndInterfaces: Framework docs and contributor workflow must stay synchronized.
invariants: The three-layer contract stays invariant across every teaching surface.
activeRisks: A downstream edit can become shadow spec text if review is weak.
nonGoals: Do not treat schema enforcement as semantic authority.

decisions: Use one lightweight workflow with a shared validation script.
changes: Add release-readiness support without heavy build tooling.
verification: Run schema and path validation locally.
ledger.crossTeamImpact: Contributors can reuse the same validation script locally and in CI.
ledger.nextStep: Keep future automation scoped to low-flake structural checks.

readFirst: Review the authority stack before touching downstream surfaces.
workingRules: Preserve low-flake validation and avoid workflow ceremony.
updateProtocol: Update release and validation surfaces when repo mechanics change.
